chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1416 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5464/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Additional Advocate General Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General ************** Mr. Shoib Niaz Khaskheli, Advocate, has filed vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.5&6, same is taken on record. Respondents No.3&4 have filed their comments, same are also taken on record. From a perusal of the comments, it appears that the final challan has been submitted before the Court of law. In view of such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner intends to approach the trial Court for appropriate relief; as such, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed, along with the listed application. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
